name: Pega_Field_Video
label: Video
description: Displays a video player that loads its source from a Pega data page.

properties.name: datapage
properties.label: Data Page
properties.description: Name of the Pega data page that returns the video source URL.

properties.name: datapageparams
properties.label: Data Page Parameters
properties.description: Comma-separated key:value parameters passed to the data page, e.g. videoId:myVideo

properties.name: isBase64
properties.label: Source is Base64
properties.description: Enable when the data page returns the video as a Base64-encoded string instead of a URL.

properties.name: videoSource
properties.label: Video Source
properties.description: Direct video source (URL or Base64 string). When provided, skips data-page fetching. Useful for Storybook/testing.
